form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months 2nd of 21 at Curragh on April 3 over 1609m, nose behind Key Witness carrying 58.5kg at $19. Previously second-up 2nd of 14 at Down Royal on September 29 over 1408m, 4 len behind Smiling carrying 61kg at $1.50. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after seven months ran last of 18 at Curragh on April 3 over 2011m, 55 len behind Fiver Friday carrying 56kg at $41. form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of ten weeks. Finished off last preparation eighth of 12 at this track in the G1 Tattersalls Ireland Novice Hurdle February 1 over 3218m, in the wet; 16 len behind Talk The Talk carrying 72kg at $23. Previous preparation first-up won by nose Curragh November 2 over 2414m on heavy track defeating Factual Fact with 61kg at $5.50. Has the talent to take this out.

form.formComment: Mare returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last campaign second of 10 at Naas October 12 over 2112m, 4 len behind Speckled Meadow with 61kg at $12. Previous preparation first-up to post a big 3.5 len win. Gowran Park April 2 2025 over 1911m defeating Tatum carrying 62kg at $6.50. Form shown last campaign makes for good reading.
